task: Add a new AIS operation across compiler, runtime, and tests.

nodes.name: architect_plan
nodes.prompt: Create the operation implementation plan: wire index, attributes, MLIR mnemonic, runtime handler behavior, and tests.

nodes.name: compiler_changes
nodes.prompt: Implement compiler-side changes from the plan.

nodes.name: runtime_changes
nodes.prompt: Implement runtime handler, dispatcher wiring, and handler tests from the plan.

nodes.name: review_and_verify
nodes.prompt: Review compiler and runtime changes for consistency, run focused tests, and report readiness.
